task: I wrote a rough note for my teacher about a change in my school day, but it needs to be cleaned up before I send it. Can you help me make it sound clear and school-appropriate?

turns.agent_response: Absolutely — send me your rough note, and I’ll help rewrite it so it sounds clear, polite, and school-appropriate.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah. Here it is:

Hi Ms. Carter,
My schedule changed for tomorrow because I have a doctor appointment in the morning. I will miss the first part of class, but I’ll come in as soon as I can. I’ll make sure to get any work I miss and turn it in on time.

Thanks,
Evan

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a cleaner, school-appropriate version:

Hi Ms. Carter,

I wanted to let you know that my schedule has changed for tomorrow because I have a doctor’s appointment in the morning. I may miss the beginning of class, but I will arrive as soon as I can. I will make sure to get any missed work and turn it in on time.

Thank you,  
Evan

If you want, I can also make it a little shorter and more casual, or a little more formal.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. It sounds clear and normal for school.
